header.subtitle: GROW WITH US
header.title: Earn More by Partnering with Trai Inc.
header.description: You know businesses that need software, apps, or digital marketing — but building it yourself isn't your game. Send them to us, and we'll handle the engineering while you earn on every deal.

points.title: We Deliver, You Earn
points.desc: You bring the relationship. We build the software, run the marketing, or deploy the AI automation. You earn a commission on every project — zero engineering overhead on your side.

points.title: 6 Years, 138+ Clients, Zero Drama
points.desc: We have been shipping production software since 2020 across 12+ industries. Your referrals go to a team that delivers on time, on budget, with fixed-price contracts.

points.title: Your Brand, Our Engine
points.desc: Need to white-label our work under your agency brand? We do that. Your client sees your name, we do the engineering behind the scenes.

points.title: Recurring Revenue
points.desc: Many of our projects turn into ongoing retainers — maintenance, marketing, new features. You earn on the initial deal and on every renewal.

programs.subtitle: PARTNERSHIP MODELS
programs.title: Choose How You Want to Work With Us

tiers.title: Referral Partner
tiers.ideal_for: CAs, Business Consultants, Freelancers, Other Agencies
tiers.desc: Know a business that needs a website, app, CRM, or marketing? Introduce them to us. If the deal closes, you earn a referral commission.
benefits: Earn 10-15% commission on every closed project
No selling required — just warm introductions
We handle the entire sales call, scoping, and delivery

tiers.title: White-Label Partner
tiers.ideal_for: Digital Agencies, Marketing Firms, IT Consultancies
tiers.desc: You sell software services but do not have an in-house dev team? We become your invisible engineering department. You own the client relationship, we build under your brand.
benefits: Full white-label delivery — your branding, our code
Dedicated engineering team for your projects
Wholesale pricing with healthy margins for you
NDA-protected — your clients never know about us

tiers.title: Technology Partner
tiers.ideal_for: SaaS Companies, Platform Providers, API Businesses
tiers.desc: Your product plus our engineering creates a stronger offering for shared customers. Joint integrations, co-marketing, and combined go-to-market.
benefits: Technical integration support from our team

ideal_partners.subtitle: WHO SHOULD PARTNER
ideal_partners.title: You Are a Great Fit If You Are
list: A Chartered Accountant serving MSME clients who need digital solutions
A marketing agency that needs development support for client projects
A business consultant who advises companies on digital transformation
A freelance designer who needs a dev team to build what you design
An IT consultancy without in-house engineering capacity
A SaaS platform looking for integration and go-to-market partners

steps.title: Apply
steps.desc: Fill in the form below or message us on WhatsApp. Tell us about your business and how you typically interact with clients who need tech services.

steps.title: Get Onboarded
steps.desc: We set you up with a partner agreement, commission structure, and a direct line to our team. The whole process takes less than a week.

steps.title: Refer & Earn
steps.desc: Send us warm introductions whenever you spot an opportunity. We handle the rest — scoping, building, delivering. You get paid when milestones are completed.

cta.title: Ready to Partner?
cta.description: Whether you want to refer one client or white-label our entire engineering team — let us talk. Book a 15-minute call or message us directly on WhatsApp.
